allow: PowerShell(Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList '/c','node server.js' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 1; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8917 ; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes"; \($r.Content -match 'tab-gmail'\) ; \($r.Content -match 'gsi/client'\))
